text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's finally time for the Satsuki Sho, the first stop
on the Classic Triple Crown tour. The stands are
packed from end to end with eager spectators.

text_block_list.name: Spectator A
text_block_list.text:
I'm cheering for Mihono Bourbon today! She's
definitely gonna win it here!

text_block_list.name: Spectator B
text_block_list.text: Personally, I think Matikanetannhauser's got it.

text_block_list.name: Spectator B
text_block_list.text:
I can't really explain it, but it just feels like she's
going to pull off something special.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Everyone is on the edge of their seat in
anticipation of the explosive race that's about to
unfold.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
There are so many people out there! It's like a
festival!
choice_data_list:
No need for nerves—you've trained hard for
this!

No need for nerves—you've trained hard for
this!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Righto! Got it!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She doesn't seem nervous at all. Just as I let out a
sigh of relief...

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Gyah!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: H-hold on! Let's go over there, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She drags me along to a secluded spot for some
reason.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
The runners' tunnel is where everyone gets
pumped up right before a race!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Seeing as I'm already super fired up, I figured I
shouldn't get in the way... See, look!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Matikanetannhauser points into the tunnel...
where Mihono Bourbon is standing.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Inhale... Exhale... No abnormalities detected in physical or mental functions.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
The Triple Crown is not only my long held
ambition, but Father's as well. Victory here is
essential in executing that order.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Commencing mission!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
It's no wonder everyone sees her as the star of
this race!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Wait, there's someone else! Is that... Rice?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Rice Shower—a reserved Umamusume with a small
build.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: I'll keep up with Bourbon today. I will keep up with her!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: And while I'm at it... I'll change myself, too.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
I'll become an Umamusume who can make
everyone smile! Just like Bourbon!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Rice, you can do this, you can do this... Yeah!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Ohoho! I get it. So that's how Rice sees Bourbon!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
It looks like there's an interesting race in store for
us!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She's sounding like an eager fan in the stands, so I
bring her back to reality.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
I know! Of course I know that! It's not like I plan
on losing!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
I'm shooting to be the Triple Crown champion!
And I can't let my fans down!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Have a little more faith! Geez!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: And on that note, I better get going!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Time to win the Satsuki Sho! Yah!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm not sure we're totally on the same page, but
it's time for the Satsuki Sho to begin.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Gah! The entrance is the other way!
